response.description_short: TradeFinderUSA is an online directory that connects homeowners with vetted local contractors and sells premium placement to listed businesses.
response.description_long:
TradeFinderUSA operates a listings directory for home-services contractors: homeowners search profiles by trade and zip code, read verified reviews, and request quotes, while contractors pay from $29/month for premium placement.

The site claims over 40,000 listed businesses and more than 2 million homeowner visits per year. It aggregates other businesses rather than offering a software product of its own.
response.not_startup_reason: Online business directory, not a software product.
